title: IANUA
tagline: Live component status for the SENTINEL platform — SOC automation, RAG, and agentic workflows.

components.name: CI/CD pipeline
components.detail: ruff, mypy, bandit, pip-audit, gitleaks, coverage gate, and CycloneDX SBOM — green on main.

components.name: Signed provenance
components.detail: SBOM + SLSA build-provenance attestations (Sigstore/OIDC), verified on main.

components.name: GitHub Pages deploy
components.detail: Publishes docs/ after CI passes on main and an operator approves the github-pages environment gate (human-in-the-loop, AGENTS.md §5.1); deadlock-proof concurrency.

components.name: Local AI stack
components.detail: Docker / Ollama / Qdrant, loopback-only and fail-closed.

components.name: RAG pipeline
components.detail: Ingest, chunk, embed, and cited retrieval with an offline mode.

components.name: Vector stores
components.detail: In-memory default plus persistent SQLite behind one VectorStore protocol.

components.name: Core agent suite
components.detail: All eight core blueprints: SOC, MITRE mapper, threat-intel, vuln, KB, incident report, detection matcher, orchestrator.

components.name: Supporting agents
components.detail: Legal/compliance, business proposal, knowledge curator, portfolio docs, executive assistant.

components.name: Policy engine
components.detail: Default-deny policy-as-code gating the MCP tool surface.

components.name: Tamper-evident audit log
components.detail: Hash-chained log with HMAC or Ed25519 head-hash signing; rotation + retention.

components.name: Tool-execution sandbox
components.detail: Rootless seccomp/AppArmor sandbox (report-mode default; enforce mode on Linux).

components.name: Streamlit command center
components.detail: SOC workflow, batch, KB search, health, and report views.

components.name: Hosted multi-agent console
components.detail: Web console for orchestrated runs — on the hardening roadmap.
